LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. ALSO, THE JUDGE DISCLOSED THAT ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS ON THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER AND FAMILY FRIEND. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE CITY HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT IT IS IMMUNED FROM THIS TYPE OF LAWSUIT. THE COURT IS NOT ALLOWING AN AMENDMENT TO THE COMPLAINT WHICH WAS JUST REQUESTED ORALLY AND FINDS THAT IT IS INAPPROPRIATE IN THE EXERCISE OF THE COURT'S DISCRETION TO ALLOW SUCH AMENDMENT. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

ATTY. RAFAL OFIERSKI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4244 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - A R G U E D; JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL.
